_templateMeta.name: Timed Event
_templateMeta.description: Fires a dialog and consequence after a set number of turns. Uses StartTurn condition.

_annotations.counters[0]: Counts turns elapsed since the map started. Incremented each turn by the repeating trigger.
_annotations.quests[0]: This quest runs silently in the background — it has no name/description visible to the player. Used as a container for the timer logic.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0]: The timer subquest. Runs for the duration of the event window.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[0]: Repeating trigger: fires every turn (StartTurn with no params = any turn, any player). Increments the turn counter.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[1]: Deadline trigger: fires when the turn counter reaches 10. Replace 10 with your desired number of turns.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[1].actio: Show a dialog when the deadline is reached. Replace 'timed_event_deadline' with your dialog ID.
Replace or remove this. Example: GameLose for a defeat condition, or any other consequence.
